response: Thin, crisp, golden-brown, hand-tossed crust; tangy, slow-simmered, bright-red tomato marinara; velvety, stringy melted mozzarella cheese; smoky, crisp, salty pepperoni slices; earthy, tender sautéed mushrooms; juicy, bursting cherry tomato halves; fresh, frilled basil leaves; crumbly, briny feta crumbles; crisp, peppery arugula; golden, smooth olive oil drizzle; flaky, coarse sea salt; fresh-cracked black peppercorns.
